widget.name: Slick Carousel
widget.description: A responsive carousel/slider widget powered by the Slick library.

property.caption: Type
property.description: Static: configure a fixed list of slides. Dynamic: bind slides to a data source.

property.caption: Slide list
property.description: Add one entry per slide.

property.caption: Caption
property.description: Optional caption displayed below the slide content.

property.caption: Content
property.description: Content to display in this slide.

property.caption: Data source
property.description: The list of items to display as slides.

property.caption: Content
property.description: Content rendered inside each slide. Use the current item's attributes here.

property.caption: Image URL attribute
property.description: String attribute containing the URL of the slide image (used when no content template is provided).

property.caption: Image alt text attribute
property.description: String attribute for the image alt text.

property.caption: On slide click
property.description: Action triggered when a slide is clicked.

property.caption: Current slide
property.description: Integer attribute to track the current slide index.

property.caption: Before change
property.description: Action performed before the slide changes.

property.caption: After change
property.description: Action performed after the slide changes.

property.caption: Autoplay
property.description: Automatically advance slides.

property.caption: Autoplay speed (ms)
property.description: Delay between slide transitions in milliseconds.

property.caption: Animation speed (ms)
property.description: Slide transition animation duration in milliseconds.

property.caption: Infinite loop
property.description: Loop slides infinitely.

property.caption: Fade transition
property.description: Use a fade effect instead of sliding. Only works when slidesToShow is 1.

property.caption: Vertical
property.description: Slide vertically instead of horizontally.

property.caption: Pause on hover
property.description: Pause autoplay when the mouse is over the carousel.

property.caption: Pause on dots hover
property.description: Pause autoplay when hovering over the dot navigation.

property.caption: Draggable
property.description: Allow dragging/swiping to navigate slides.

property.caption: Lazy load
property.description: Lazy loading strategy for slide images.

property.caption: Initial slide
property.description: Zero-based index of the slide to show on first load. Default 0 = first slide.

property.caption: Slides to show (desktop)
property.description: Number of slides visible at once on desktop screens (>992px).

property.caption: Slides to show (tablet)
property.description: Number of slides visible on tablet screens (≤992px). Set to 0 to use the desktop value.

property.caption: Slides to show (phone)
property.description: Number of slides visible on phone screens (≤768px). Set to 0 to use the desktop value.

property.caption: Slides to scroll (desktop)
property.description: Number of slides to advance per navigation action on desktop screens (>992px).

property.caption: Slides to scroll (tablet)
property.description: Slides to scroll on tablet screens (≤992px). Set to 0 to use the desktop value.

property.caption: Slides to scroll (phone)
property.description: Slides to scroll on phone screens (≤768px). Set to 0 to use the desktop value.

property.caption: Show dots
property.description: Display dot navigation indicators.

property.caption: Show arrows
property.description: Display previous/next arrow buttons.

property.caption: Arrow style
property.description: Visual style of the navigation arrows. Select "Custom" to use your own content drop zones for full creative control.

property.caption: Previous arrow content
property.description: Custom content for the previous (left/top) arrow. Only used when Arrow style is "Custom".

property.caption: Next arrow content
property.description: Custom content for the next (right/bottom) arrow. Only used when Arrow style is "Custom".

property.caption: Center mode
property.description: Show partial previous/next slides on either side of the active slide.

property.caption: Center padding
property.description: Side padding in center mode (e.g. "50px"). Only used when Center mode is enabled.

property.caption: Adaptive height
property.description: Adjust the carousel height to match the current slide.

property.caption: Variable width
property.description: Allow slides to have different widths (set width via CSS on slide elements).
